name: Name

hero.headline: Delicious Crispy Chicken
hero.description: Enjoy our mouth-watering, perfectly seasoned fried chicken and delicious meals. Fast delivery and fresh ingredients guaranteed!

shopByCategory.title: Shop by Category
shopByCategory.description: Browse our wide range of categories

about.title: About Us
about.storyText: Founded in 2020, CrispyBites began with a simple mission: to bring the best tasting fried chicken to food lovers everywhere. What started as a small kitchen has grown into a beloved destination for delicious meals.
about.missionText: We strive to provide an exceptional dining experience by serving high-quality, freshly prepared chicken with our secret blend of spices.
about.visionText: To become the most loved chicken restaurant, where great taste meets convenience, and every meal brings joy.
about.qualityDesc: We never compromise on food quality. Every meal is prepared fresh with the finest ingredients.
about.customerFocusDesc: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do.
about.integrityDesc: We operate with transparency and honesty in all our dealings.
about.innovationDesc: We continuously seek new recipes and flavors to improve your dining experience.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you
contact.description: Have a question or feedback? Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

form.successMessage: Thank you! We will get back to you soon.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

info.title: Get in Touch
info.description: Our team is ready to assist you with any questions or concerns.

footer.description: Your favorite destination for mouth-watering chicken meals. We serve the crispiest, most delicious food in town.
